title: SkillsFuture Series
text:
SkillsFuture Series - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Series
Share link
Provides short, industry-relevant training for in-demand skills in Care, Digital, Green, and Industry 4.0 sectors.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Offers short, industry-relevant training programmes
Focus on emerging skills in Care, Digital, Green, and Industry 4.0 sectors
Training across Basic, Intermediate, and Advanced levels for different proficiencies
Collapse all sections
About this support

Training across Basic, Intermediate, and Advanced levels to match different skill proficiencies

Acquire foundational or advanced skills to boost career prospects and enhance employability

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents, criteria may vary depending on courses

How to apply?

To enrol in a SkillsFuture Series course:

Visit the MySkillsFuture portal

Log in with your Singpass to access the course directory

Search for SkillsFuture Series courses under the respective growth areas: Care Economy, Digital Economy, Green Economy, or Industry 4.0

Select a course at the Basic, Intermediate, or Advanced level according to your proficiency

Follow the instructions to sign up for your chosen course

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6786 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry
